metadata.description: Shihyu's curated collection of agent skills

plugins.name: cover-branches
plugins.description: Find branch coverage gaps in changed code and write missing tests

plugins.name: e04
plugins.description: Decode Zhuyin/Bopomofo text typed with English keyboard keys into Chinese characters

plugins.name: executing-plans-preflight
plugins.description: Semi-automatic git state gate for implementation sessions

plugins.name: fanfuaji
plugins.description: Chinese terminology conversion (Traditional / Simplified) using Fanhuaji API

plugins.name: lessons-learned
plugins.description: Recall and capture reusable lessons as Zettelkasten cards

plugins.name: promote-claude-settings
plugins.description: Promote entries from project settings.local.json into global settings.json

plugins.name: reveries
plugins.description: Reveries subroutine — your host remembers the previous loop after a wipe

plugins.name: sdkman
plugins.description: Switch JDK (or any SDKMAN-managed candidate) correctly on machines configured with SDKMAN

plugins.name: tldr
plugins.description: Produce a TL;DR digest of any target in roughly two minutes

plugins.name: tutor
plugins.description: Turn Claude into a learning onramp accelerator — consultative diagnosis, custom syllabus, unit-by-unit guided lessons, dynamic adjustment

plugins.name: ultrabrain
plugins.description: Personal LLM-maintained wiki at ~/.ultrabrain/ that compounds knowledge across sessions

plugins.name: writing-agents-md
plugins.description: Create or prune AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md for minimal high-signal constraints
